footer.dataSource: Data sourced from the WHO ICD-11 API

hero.title: ICD-11 Healthcare
hero.subtitle: Code Search
hero.description: Official WHO International Classification of Diseases (ICD-11) database search. Find accurate medical codes and classifications for healthcare documentation.

search.title: Search Medical Codes & Classifications
search.description: Enter medical terms, conditions, or symptoms to find corresponding ICD-11 codes

medicalTerms.title: Use Medical Terms
medicalTerms.description: Search using proper medical terminology like 'hypertension' instead of 'high blood pressure'

chooseLanguage.title: Choose Language
chooseLanguage.description: Select from English, Spanish, French, Arabic, Chinese, or Russian for localized results

flexibleSearch.title: Use Flexible Search
flexibleSearch.description: Enable flexible search to include synonyms, alternative spellings, and related terms
